latin: Gatsby credidit se praeteritum repetere posse. divitias collegit, palatium aedificavit, convivia dedit — omnia propter Daisy. sed tempus retro fluere non potest, et lumen viride semper trans aquam manebat.
translation: Gatsby believed he could repeat the past. He gathered riches, built a mansion, threw parties — all for Daisy. But time cannot flow backwards, and the green light always remained across the water.
